issues.problem: Footer claims 'Phases: 11/14' but no explicit Phase Gate Checklist section enumerates which phases were completed, making it impossible to audit P2/P3 data-gathering claims.
Descriptions correctly note population for 2023-12 only, but don't confirm no downstream UC consumers depend on these fields being populated.

Harness bundle resolver failed to find Tribe.CardsSnapshots_BankAccounts-83854.md at knowledge/ProdSchemas/BankingDBs/FiatDwhDB/Wiki/Tribe/Tables/. Writer correctly found it independently. Harness resolver should be updated to search BankingDBs paths.

Tier 3 is correct — production has @CardsSnapshots@Id-890718 (FK to root) while Synapse has @CardsSnapshots_Account@Id-513255 (FK to intermediate Account-513255). Structural divergence well-documented in review-needed sidecar.
